ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "orderNumber" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "orderDate" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "requiredDate" TEXT /* Date the order is required */,
  "shippedDate" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the order */,
  "customerNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "salesRepEmployeeNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the order */,
  "orderTotal" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "paymentMethod" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "orderType" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderNumber"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customerNumber FOREIGN KEY ("customerNumber") REFERENCES customers ("customerNumber"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_salesRepEmployeeNumber FOREIGN KEY ("salesRepEmployeeNumber") REFERENCES sales_reps ("employeeNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_tracking" (
  "orderNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "trackingNumber" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "shipDate" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "expectedDeliveryDate" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderNumber", "trackingNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customerNumber" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customerName" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contactLastName" TEXT /* Last name of the contact person */,
  "contactFirstName" TEXT /* First name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "addressLine1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "addressLine2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postalCode" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "salesRepEmployeeNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative assigned to the customer */,
  "creditLimit" TEXT /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyaltyProgram" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerNumber"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_salesRepEmployeeNumber FOREIGN KEY ("salesRepEmployeeNumber") REFERENCES sales_reps ("employeeNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "employeeNumber" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "lastName" TEXT /* Last name of the sales representative */,
  "firstName" TEXT /* First name of the sales representative */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension of the sales representative's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "officeCode" TEXT /* Code of the office where the sales representative is located */,
  "reportsTo" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the sales representative */,
  "jobTitle" TEXT /* Job title of the sales representative */,
  "commissionRate" TEXT /* Commission rate for the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employeeNumber"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_officeCode FOREIGN KEY ("officeCode") REFERENCES offices ("officeCode")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouseCode" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouseName" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "addressLine1" TEXT /* First line of the warehouse's address */,
  "addressLine2" TEXT /* Second line of the warehouse's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "postalCode" TEXT /* Postal code of the warehouse's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouseCode")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "productCode" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "warehouseCode" TEXT /* Code of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantityInStock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "quantityInReserve" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in reserve */,
  "reorderLevel" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorderQuantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productCode", "warehouseCode")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipmentId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "orderNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "warehouseCode" TEXT /* Code of the warehouse shipping the order */,
  "shipDate" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "trackingNumber" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipmentId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouseCode FOREIGN KEY ("warehouseCode") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouseCode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_orderNumber FOREIGN KEY ("orderNumber") REFERENCES orders ("orderNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "customerNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the payment */,
  "checkNumber" TEXT /* Number of the check or payment method */,
  "paymentDate" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "paymentMethod" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerNumber", "checkNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "productCode" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "productName" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "productLine" TEXT /* Line of the product */,
  "productScale" TEXT /* Scale of the product */,
  "productDescription" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantityInStock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "buyPrice" TEXT /* Buy price of the product */,
  "MSRP" TEXT /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price (MSRP) */,
  "productWeight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "productDimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productCode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_productLine FOREIGN KEY ("productLine") REFERENCES product_lines ("productLine")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "orderNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "productCode" TEXT /* Code of the product */,
  "quantityOrdered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "priceEach" TEXT /* Price of each product */,
  "orderLineNumber" INTEGER /* Line number of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderNumber", "productCode")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "productLine" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "textDescription" TEXT /* Text description of the product line */,
  "htmlDescription" TEXT /* HTML description of the product line */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image representing the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("productLine")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "officeCode" TEXT /* Code of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "addressLine1" TEXT /* First line of the office's address */,
  "addressLine2" TEXT /* Second line of the office's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "postalCode" TEXT /* Postal code of the office's address */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory where the office is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officeCode")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers_rewards" (
  "customerNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the customer earning rewards */,
  "rewardPoints" INTEGER /* Number of reward points earned */,
  "rewardLevel" TEXT /* Level of rewards earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customerNumber")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "orderNumber" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "statusDate" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "orderStatus" TEXT /* Status of the order at the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orderNumber", "statusDate")
)
